items.title: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
items.summary: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.

items.title: Nothing won't launch a new phone this year in its budget-focused CMF Phone series due to RAM prices (Ben Schoon/9to5Google)

Nothing won't launch a new phone this year in its budget-focused CMF Phone series due to RAM prices  —  Nothing's CMF Phone series has released two models thus far and, at least for now, won't be getting a third, as the rising cost of materials has essentially left the series dead in the water.

items.title: Score up to $893 bundled savings + price cuts on Lectric e-bikes during its Father’s Day Sale starting from $799
items.summary: Lectric has launched its Father’s Day e-bike Sale with up to $893 savings and 15% off accessories, with the main focus being on the Xpedition2 Cargo e-bikes that are getting the biggest savings. During this event, you can find the Xpedition2 Single-Battery e-bike with a $346 FREE bundle at $1,399 shipped, while the Xpedition2 Dual-Battery e-bike comes with a $744 FREE bundle at $1,799 shipped, and the Xpedition2 Long-Range Dual-Battery e-bike gets a $893 FREE bundle at $1,999 shipped. Normally these bundles would run for $1,745, $2,543, and $2,892 without the usual savings on the bundles, which are coming in as the biggest collective savings yet in 2026. These bundles are primarily focused on comfortable passenger-forward accessories, especially for parents who are in need of a new way to shepherd their kids around safely. Head below to check out the full lineup of offers across the brand’s entire fleet.

This package goes for $5,199 at full price, which we saw discounted furthest to $2,279 in 2025, and $2,149 in 2026, which was seen in last month’s EcoCredits Madness Sale for only a handful of days. Now, you’re getting a brand new all-time low price for this bundle with $3,057 savings. You can also find the station on its own for $1,614 shipped, using the above code, beating Amazon by $85, too. Head below to get the full rundown on extra savings during this sale, as well as to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: Docs: OpenAI burned through $3.7B in Q1, on revenue of $5.7B, and ended the quarter with $73B+ in cash and marketable securities vs. $40B at the end of December (Erin Woo/The Information)
items.summary:
Erin Woo / The Information:
Docs: OpenAI burned through $3.7B in Q1, on revenue of $5.7B, and ended the quarter with $73B+ in cash and marketable securities vs. $40B at the end of December  —  OpenAI burned through $3.7 billion in the first quarter, more than half its $5.7 billion in revenue, according to documents the company shared with shareholders.

UGREEN USB-C SD Card Reader with Storage

Buy for $14 (Reg. $22)

What we love

SD cards are useful for a lot of things, but for me the most common place I rely on them is security cameras. I have five cameras around my home that all record 24/7 to microSD cards and it’s nice to be able to access that footage with a reader like this. Space to stow cards is a unique perk offered by this unit.
